title: Rule-guided Retrieval-Augmented Generation with LMs

defines.name: RuleRAG
defines.definition: A rule-guided retrieval-augmented generation framework that uses explicit rules to steer document retrieval and answer generation for question answering.

defines.name: RuleRAG-ICL
defines.definition: A training-free in-context learning variant of RuleRAG that injects rules into retrievers and generators to improve retrieval and reasoning.

defines.name: RuleRAG-FT
defines.definition: A fine-tuned variant of RuleRAG that uses query-rule pairs to update retrievers and generators for better rule-following ability.

problem: Standard RAG only conditions on the query, leading to blind retrieval and weak, poorly attributed reasoning over noisy retrieved documents.
